summary: Production Readiness Pass v259 - All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Settings Hub has 14 tabs including Operational Rules and Partner Policy, PartnerSmartForm shows Vendor Classification dropdown and Capacity Notes textarea, Admin Orders table uses table-fixed, PartnerUnifiedTable shows Classification column with vendor_type badges.
critical_code_review_comments: settings_resolver.py: Central resolver with PLATFORM_DEFAULTS includes operational_rules, distribution_config, partner_policy sections with all required fields
admin_settings_hub_routes.py: GET returns deep-merged settings, PUT saves and calls invalidate_settings_cache()
sales_orders_routes.py: GET /api/sales/orders/{id} enriches vendor_orders from vendor_orders collection with vendor_name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email
partner_routes.py: POST/PUT accept vendor_type, supported_services, preferred_partner, capacity_notes fields
SalesOrderDrawerV2.jsx: VendorOrderCard component renders expandable cards with status, items, and contact info
AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: 14 tabs including OperationsTab and PartnersTab with correct data-testid attributes
PartnerSmartForm.jsx: Shows Vendor Classification dropdown (data-testid='vendor-type-select') and Capacity Notes textarea (data-testid='capacity-notes-input')
PartnerUnifiedTable.jsx: Shows Classification column with vendor_type badges and star icon for preferred partners
OrdersPage.jsx: Table uses 'table-fixed' class for no horizontal scroll on desktop
seed_data_creation: Created test partners during backend tests (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production readiness pass complete. Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub has 14 tabs. New sections: operational_rules (date_format, timezone, follow_up_threshold_days, stale_deal_threshold_days, quote_response_threshold_days, payment_overdue_threshold_days), distribution_config (protected_company_margin_percent, affiliate/sales/promo/referral/country_bonus percentages), partner_policy (auto_assignment_mode, logistics_handling_default, vendor_types). Sales order detail at /api/sales/orders/{id} returns vendor_orders array. Partner CRUD at /api/admin/partners accepts vendor_type, supported_services, preferred_partner, capacity_notes. PartnerSmartForm is at /admin/partner-ecosystem (not /admin/partners). Admin tables use table-fixed class.

settings_hub_api.GET /api/admin/settings-hub: Returns operational_rules, distribution_config, partner_policy sections with all required fields
settings_hub_api.PUT /api/admin/settings-hub: Saves changes, sets updated_at, invalidates cache

sales_order_vendor_orders.GET /api/sales/orders/{id}: Returns vendor_orders array with vendor_name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email, items, status

frontend_components.AdminSettingsHubPage: 14 tabs including Operational Rules and Partner Policy
frontend_components.PartnerSmartForm: Vendor Classification dropdown and Capacity Notes textarea with data-testid attributes
frontend_components.PartnerUnifiedTable: Classification column with vendor_type badges, table-fixed class
frontend_components.OrdersPage: table-fixed class, no horizontal scroll on desktop
